title: Google Sheets Trigger returns internal error 500
symptom: All workflows using the Google Sheets Trigger fail with a 500 internal error message. This occurs after a recent update to n8n.
not_this_if: Error does not occur with other triggers
root_cause: The error indicates that the Google Sheets API encountered an internal error, which may be related to recent changes in n8n or the Google Sheets API itself. Downgrading to a previous version resolved the issue, suggesting a compatibility problem with the latest update.
fix_steps: Downgrade n8n to version 1.76.2 or earlier
agent_instruction: Downgrade n8n to version 1.76.2 or earlier to resolve the issue.
